title: Estellium Legends II
description:
Estellium Legends II is the sequel to Estellium Legends. You do not need to play Estellium Legends in order to understand EL II.

Estellium Legends II is an arena-based JRPG featuring a short story mode that allows you to hire, train

and fight alongside over 100 playable characters in turn-based RPG combat.

Plot:

Every one-hundred years, a "Gifted" one is born. Their duty is to restore balance to the planet, the universe and life itself.

This is the sole duty of the "Gifted". However, centuries have passed and not a single "Gifted" one has succeeded.

Thanks to the Reun, an evil society hell-bent on destroying the "Gifted" one and all hope they may bring.

Hopefully, with the arrival of the next "Gifted" one...

That will all change and hope may be restored once again.

Only time will tell.

<Features>

-A story that is a couple of chapters long.

-Arena mode with multiple ranks.

-A customizable character in Arena mode.

-Over 100 playable characters both old and new from Team Syukino works.

-Multiple items, weapons, gear, etc to collect.

-9 characters in battle at once, with the ability to swap between more in and out of combat.
description_short: The gifted one must succeed no matter the cost. Survive against all threats, utilize a plethora of weapons and armor on over 100 characters in the Arena and fight your way to the end in this JRPG.
